title: Add parallel e2e job to CI workflow
acceptance_criteria: New job 'e2e' added alongside existing 'test' and 'build' jobs; existing jobs unchanged

Steps: checkout; setup-node 20.19 with npm cache; npm ci; cache ~/.cache/ms-playwright keyed on the resolved Playwright version (e.g. hashFiles package-lock.json or a version string); npx playwright install --with-deps chromium; npm run test:e2e
Job env sets CI=true plus DEV_DATABASE_URL=file:./e2e.db, NEXTAUTH_SECRET dummy, NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000, AUTH_PROVIDER=nextauth, RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR=100000
Upload playwright-report/ as an artifact with if: always()
Job does NOT set continue-on-error (a failing @critical test must fail the workflow run)
YAML is valid and triggers on the same push/PR to main & develop as the existing workflow
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
